THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PECINA, IGNACIO ASUNCION, PECINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 540 CAPP STREET, APT. 102 $3,293.29 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $169.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,962.29, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. VACATES BY 11/13/94(MIDNIGHT) PLT. WILL LIMIT JUDGMENT TO $1,000.00(DEFT. WILL FORFEIT ALL DEPOSITS HELD BY PLT. WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 11/13/94.
